description: DQ rule patterns for concept normalization quality. @dq-rule-writer must evaluate each pattern when a base zone spec includes concept normalization.

patterns.description: All confidence scores must be in [0.0, 1.0]
patterns.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table} WHERE confidence < 0.0 OR confidence > 1.0

patterns.description: Mapped concepts must cover >= {coverage_pct}% of source rows
patterns.sql_template: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE canonical_concept IS NOT NULL) AS DOUBLE) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) FROM {table}

patterns.description: All Tier 1 (exact match) concepts must have an approved business term
patterns.sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table} WHERE tier = 1 AND (business_term_id IS NULL OR approval_status != 'approved')
